title: BookStore App
description: Full-stack bookstore with storefront search and product details, cart/checkout, admin management for books/orders/users, and email-based password reset.

title: Amazon Clone
description: Amazon-style e-commerce app with authentication, product search/filtering, cart and checkout, orders, and an admin panel for products and order status.

title: ChatApp MERN
description: Real-time chat app with separate frontend/backend, chat APIs, JWT-based auth, and Docker Compose + Nginx deployment targeting MongoDB Atlas.
